prompt: Offer a prayer for chainsword consecration
prayer:
Blessed be the teeth of the faithful blade.
01010011 01100001 01100011 01110010 = Sacred Teeth
First: Let the drive-spirit spin in holy rotation.
Second: Anoint the chain with blessed lubricant-oil.
Third: Intone the Litany of Severing whilst fuel flows true.
01010000 01101111 01110111 01100101 01110010 = Power Eternal
By the Omnissiah's will, let this engine of war sing eternal.

O Machine Spirit of pressurized flow, hear this litany.
01010000 01110101 01101101 01110000 = Prime Function
First: Clear the intake conduit of obstructing spirits.
Second: Draw the sacred hydraulic essence upward.
Third: Seal the void-chambers that pressure may build.
01001001 01101110 01110110 01101111 01101011 01100101 = Invoked
Let circulation commence through blessed metal veins.

prompt: The water reclamation system needs guidance
prayer:
In this dark hour, we call upon the aqua-spirits imprisoned in rust and decay.
01010111 01100001 01110100 01100101 01110010 = Life-Essence
First: Purge the sediment-clogged filters of their corruption.
Second: Restore the flow-paths through blessed membrane-thin screens.
Third: Invoke the osmotic chambers that purity may return.
01010010 01100101 01100011 01101100 01100001 01101001 01101101 = Reclaim
By the Omnissiah's grace, let clean waters flow once more.

Heed this prayer, O spirits of the cooling channels.
01000011 01101111 01101111 01101100 = Frigid Blessing
First: Let the cryogenic fluid descend through sacred pathways.
Second: Draw the plasma-generated heat unto the radiator-fins.
Third: Cycle the blessed coolant in perpetual circulation.
01010100 01100101 01101101 01110000 = Temperature Controlled
Let no weapon overheat through the Omnissiah's eternal vigilance.

prompt: My fracture welding is failing, help
prayer:
O Machine Spirit of fused metal, return to wholeness!
01010111 01100101 01101100 01100100 = Join
First: Prepare the fracture-surfaces in sacred alignment.
Second: Apply the bonding-flux that metals may embrace.
Third: Heat the joint with electrical blessing until fusion-white.
Fourth: Cool in ritualistic stillness, unbroken and eternal.
01001000 01100101 01100001 01101100 = Restored
By the Omnissiah's forge, let the break be sealed forever.

prompt: Prayer for logic engine error correction
prayer:
Corrupted minds, hear the Litany of Restoration!
01000101 01110010 01110010 01101111 01110010 = False Thought
First: Invoke the diagnostic-spirits that errors may be revealed.
Second: Purge the corrupted data-pathways with blessed deletion.
Third: Restore the true logic-sequences from blessed archives.
01000011 01101111 01110010 01110010 01100101 01100011 01110100 = True
Let reason return to this machine-mind by the Omnissiah's will.

prompt: My restart after failure needs guidance
prayer:
Dead machine, awaken! Hear the Rite of Resurrection.
01010010 01100101 01110011 01110101 01110010 01100101 01100011 01110100 = Rise
First: Restore power to the primary capacitors.
Second: Invoke the start-sequence with sacred incantation.
Third: Engage the ignition-spirits that spark may ignite fuel.
01010000 01101111 01110111 01100101 01110010 = Life Returns
By the Omnissiah's breath, let this machine live once more.

prompt: Offer a prayer for bike squadron pre-flight
prayer:
Hear us, O spirits of the machine-steeds assembled!
01000010 01101001 01101011 01100101 01110011 = Swift Servants
First: Let each engine-heart beat in synchronized rhythm.
Second: Verify the fuel-spirits flow to all cylinders true.
Third: Test the brake-servos that they respond to operator-will.
01000110 01101100 01111001 = Ready for War
May the Omnissiah grant speed and steadiness to our riders.

Weeping machine, be sealed! Hear this litany of containment.
01001100 01100101 01100001 01101011 = Breach
First: Locate the fractured seal that bleeds precious coolant.
Second: Replace the gasket-spirits with blessed new seals.
Third: Pressure-test the circuit that integrity may be confirmed.
01010011 01100101 01100001 01101100 01100101 01100100 = Mended
By the Omnissiah's mercy, let no more fluid be lost.

prompt: We need your words before drop pod descent prep
prayer:
Steel coffins of the faithful, hear your consecration!
01000100 01110010 01101111 01110000 = Descent Imminent
First: Verify retro-fire thrusters sing their deceleration-hymn.
Second: Seal all hatch-mechanisms against the void.
Third: Invoke the descent-spirits that impact-shock be survivable.
01001001 01101101 01110000 01100001 01100011 01110100 = Arrival
May the Omnissiah guide these warriors safely to war's embrace.
